hard_rules: Named NPC records must represent individuated persons and must not use numbered role labels as canonical names.
If source_truth_status is direct_canon then evidence_tier must equal direct_canon.
Direct-canon notable NPCs must have at least one usable settlement/locality anchor when the corpus supports a seat of office or operating center.
Shared surname alone may support at most house/surname association; it must not imply blood lineage when corpus text narrows the relationship differently.
release_blockers: Any numbered placeholder record remaining inside named_npcs.
Any direct_canon record with evidence_tier != direct_canon.
Any relationship edge derived_from_shared_surname that contradicts narrower supported relation text.
